title: Warm up
content: This slide features images representing three Chinese cities: Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. The images depict driving scenes that suggest city characteristics.

title: An Evolving Nation
content: The slide presents a theme of transformation and modernization in China. It includes visuals of taxis and significant cityscapes.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: The session focuses on investigating and researching city dynamics. It covers local features, development strategies, and their positive outcomes.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: This slide maps specific development strategies to the three cities. Beijing focuses on technology and tradition integration, Chongqing on sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou on tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers…
content: The slide links the perspectives of taxi drivers to city development themes. It emphasizes the role of local strategies in promoting city growth.
